/CAL:ORDER AIDS TEST PURS 1202,1PC & CLARIFY VIF (CDC LETTER)/CO:COURT AMENDED THE ABSTRACT AS FOLLOWS:CDC TO PERFORM THE BLOOD TEST ON DEFENDANT PURSUANT TO 1202,1PC; & DEFT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION FINE IN THE AMOUNT OF $200ON EACH COUNT FOR A TOTAL OF $400 PURSUANT TO 1202,4PC/
/CAL:TO SET VICTIM RESTN HEARING/DAWT/DEF:TRANSPORTED TO CDC/X:PER COUNSEL'S ORAL REPRESENTATION, THE RESTITUTION AMOUNT OF $2000 WAS PAID IN FULL BY INSTALLMENT,/

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:THE VICTIMS AND ON BEHALF OF THE VICTIMS ADDRESSES THE COURT WITH THEIR STATEMENTS,/AJW/CH2:SP 3Y:L/2933,1(C)/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 79 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 11 DAYSSAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 90 DAYS,/DNACOMP/STATES/VF5:200/PAR/CDC/SECFEE40/ICNA/REST:TBD TO VAN D,/TEXT/5A/5B/CONTD:TO SET VICTIM RESTITUTION HEARING ON 08-10-11/

/CAL:DISPOSITION/AMEND:1 TO PENAL CODE SECTION 245(A)(1) AS A FELONY/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1 AND 2//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:06-15-11/REMA/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP//VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING SET ON 05-23-11/
/CAL:TOSET OR DISPO,DA MTN TO COMPEL DNA & DEFENSE OPP MTN TO COMPEL/INTORD:SPANISH/X:DA MOTION TO COMPEL DNA IS GRANTED AND COURT SIGNS ORDER COMPELLING/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD:05-31-11 60TH/SAORD/SA1:VAN D/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO, DOP/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPOSE/DOP/
/CAL:ORDER AIDS TEST PURS 1202,1PC & CLARIFY VIF (CDC LETTER)/NP/CONT/
/CAL:ORDER AIDS TESTING PURSUAN TP 1202,1 & CLARIFY VIF/NP/CON:JOHN ZAHAR/CONT/
/CAL:TO SET VICTIM RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/DEF:IN STATE PRISON/X:PARTIESHAVE AGREED ON VICTIM RESTITUTION,/CONT/
/CAL:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/X:COURT AND COUNSEL HELD PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE IN CHAMBERS,/X:THE PRELIMINARY HEARING OF 05-23-11 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL:TO BE SET/X:JUDGE CHAN HAS GIVEN DEPT 12 PERMISSION TO SET PERLIM HRGIN DEPT M20/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
